settingsHub.title: Settings Menu
settingsHub.subtitle: Manage models, channels, appearance, and system settings from one place.

update.latest: You already have the latest version
update.dialogMessage: A new version was detected. Update now?
update.downloadedMessage: Version v{{version}} has finished downloading. Click to install and restart the app.
update.downloadedReady: The update has finished downloading. Click to install and restart the app.

sessionArchive.title: Session Archive
sessionArchive.subtitle: Review archived conversations from {{appName}} and restore them when you need to continue.
sessionArchive.searchPlaceholder: Search by title or session ID
sessionArchive.emptyFiltered: No archived sessions match the current search.
sessionArchive.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete session "{{label}}"?

appearance.title: General
appearance.launchAtStartupDesc: Automatically launch {{appName}} when you log in

storage.title: File Storage
storage.description: Set one shared location for uploads and assistant outputs, and Deep AI Worker will organize everything by session automatically.
storage.fileStorageDirDesc: Deep AI Worker stores uploaded files and assistant outputs here, then organizes them by session automatically.
storage.sessionLayoutHint: Files are stored as <selected folder>/<agent>/<session>/uploads and <selected folder>/<agent>/<session>/outputs.
storage.saveFailed: Failed to update file storage directory
storage.reset: Using the default file storage directory

aiProviders.title: AI Providers
aiProviders.description: Configure your AI model providers and API keys

overview.title: Provider Accounts
overview.description: A summary of the provider accounts and models currently configured.

empty.title: No providers configured
empty.desc: Add an AI provider to start using {{appName}}

dialog.title: Add AI Provider
dialog.desc: Configure a new AI model provider
dialog.apiKeyConfigured: An API key is already stored for this provider.
dialog.apiKeyMissing: No API key is stored for this provider yet.
dialog.apiKeyStored: Your API key is stored locally on your machine.
dialog.replaceApiKeyHelp: The currently stored API key is filled into this field. Update it here and save when needed.
dialog.codePlanPresetDesc: Code Plan uses https://ark.cn-beijing.volces.com/api/coding/v3 and model ark-code-latest. Do not use /api/v3 for Code Plan traffic.
dialog.fallbackModelIdsHelp: One model ID per line. These models use the current provider config before falling back to other providers.
dialog.noFallbackOptions: Add another provider first to use it as a fallback target.
dialog.modelIdHelp: You can enter multiple model IDs at once with English or Chinese commas. The first model will be saved as the default.

card.failedModelsHint: Remove failed model IDs before adding more or saving.

toast.minimaxConflict: Cannot add both MiniMax (Global) and MiniMax (CN) providers.
toast.reusePassedModelTests: Reused the model IDs that already passed testing
toast.removeFailedModelsBeforeAdd: Remove failed model IDs before adding more.
toast.modelIdsAlreadyAdded: Those model IDs are already added.
toast.addModelIdsBeforeTest: Add the model IDs in the input before testing.
toast.removeFailedModelsBeforeSave: Remove failed model IDs before saving.
toast.testPassedRequiredBeforeSave: At least one model ID must pass testing before saving.
toast.retestRequiredBeforeSave: There are new changes. Retest before saving.
toast.testAllModelsBeforeSave: Test every model ID and make sure they all pass before saving.
toast.testInProgressBeforeSave: Wait for testing to finish before saving.

oauth.loginPrompt: This provider requires signing in via your browser.
oauth.browserFlowUnavailable: Browser OAuth is not wired for this provider yet.
oauth.step2: Open the login page in your browser.
oauth.step3: Paste the code to approve access.

gateway.title: Gateway
gateway.proxyDesc: Route Electron and Gateway traffic through your local proxy client.
gateway.proxyServerHelp: The default proxy for all requests. Bare host:port values default to HTTP.
gateway.proxyHttpServerHelp: Advanced override for HTTP requests. Leave blank to use Proxy Server.
gateway.proxyHttpsServerHelp: Advanced override for HTTPS requests. Leave blank to use Proxy Server.
gateway.proxyAllServerHelp: Advanced fallback for SOCKS-capable clients and protocols such as Telegram. Leave blank to use Proxy Server.
gateway.proxyBypassHelp: Semicolon, comma, or newline separated hosts that should connect directly.
gateway.proxyRestartNote: Saving reapplies Electron networking and restarts the Gateway immediately. Regular Gateway restarts keep existing Telegram channel proxy values when proxy is disabled; save while disabled to clear them.

logs.title: Logs & Audit
logs.description: Review operational logs and audit records in local time, then narrow them down by file, keyword, and time range.
logs.searchPlaceholder: Search messages, errors, or stack traces
logs.auditSearchPlaceholder: Search actions, resources, request IDs, or error details
logs.localTimeHint: Displayed times use your current local timezone, and file rotation now follows your local calendar day.
logs.auditHint: Audit records cover key local mutations such as settings, provider, channel, cron, and agent changes.
logs.empty: No logs matched the current filters.
logs.collapsedHint: The log viewer stays folded by default so the settings page opens faster. Expand it only when you need to inspect or export logs.
logs.policyDescription: Keep log growth under control without losing the history you still need for troubleshooting and audit review.
logs.auditToggleDesc: Record key local mutations as structured audit events.
logs.policyHint: Changes apply to new writes immediately. Old files beyond the retention window are cleaned up automatically.

validation.appRetentionDays: Application log retention must be between 1 and 365 days.
validation.auditRetentionDays: Audit log retention must be between 1 and 365 days.
validation.maxFileSizeMb: The single log file limit must be between 4 MB and 512 MB.

updates.title: Updates

status.installing: Installing update and preparing to restart...
status.check: Check for updates to get the latest features

installOverlay.title: Installing update, please wait
installOverlay.description: The app is shutting down and handing off to the system installer. Do not close the app, click repeatedly, or keep interacting with the UI.
installOverlay.detailWindows: Windows usually continues with a system installer flow. Follow the installer and wait for the app to restart.
installOverlay.detailMac: macOS may appear briefly unresponsive during replacement. This is expected. Please wait for the system to finish and relaunch the app.
installOverlay.detailLinux: On Linux, the app may briefly look unresponsive during installation. If the system shows a Wait option, choose Wait and do not force close the app, or the update may fail.
installOverlay.waitHint: Please avoid interacting with the app during installation
installOverlay.slowHint: Still working. Keep waiting for the system installer to finish

updates.help: When auto-update is enabled, updates are downloaded and installed automatically.

advanced.title: Advanced

transport.label: Gateway Transport Preference
transport.desc: Choose how renderer requests gateway RPC: WebSocket, HTTP proxy, or IPC fallback.

advanced.chatProcessDisplayDesc: Control whether tool execution and read-process cards appear in the conversation.
advanced.dreamModeDesc: Syncs OpenClaw memory dreaming and shows the Dreams workspace.
advanced.assistantMessageStyleDesc: Switch between the current bubble reply and a flatter event-stream reply.
advanced.hideInternalRoutineProcessesDesc: Keep heartbeat, housekeeping, and other internal self-check process entries out of the chat unless you are debugging.
advanced.chatFontScaleDesc: Adjust message and composer font size for a lighter, easier reading experience.
advanced.telemetryDesc: Allow providing anonymous basic usage data to improve {{appName}}

dream.title: Dreams
dream.subtitle: {{appName}} memory consolidation
dream.gatewayStoppedDesc: Dream status is available after the OpenClaw Gateway starts.

developer.title: Developer
developer.consoleDesc: Access the native OpenClaw management interface
developer.consoleNote: Opens the Control UI with gateway token injected
developer.gatewayTokenDesc: Paste this into Control UI settings if prompted
developer.cliDesc: Copy a command to run OpenClaw without modifying PATH.
developer.doctorDesc: Run `openclaw doctor` and inspect the raw diagnostic output.
developer.doctorFixRunFailed: Failed to run OpenClaw doctor fix
developer.auditLoggingDesc: Keep a separate audit trail for settings and critical local operations.
developer.auditModeDesc: Minimal captures change summaries. Full keeps richer operational context.
developer.logLevelDesc: Controls how much operational detail the app writes to its main log.
developer.wsDiagnosticDesc: Temporarily enable WS/HTTP fallback chain for gateway RPC debugging.
developer.installDetail: This will create ~/.local/bin/openclaw. Ensure ~/.local/bin is on your PATH if you want to run it globally.

about.title: About
about.basedOn: Developed based on ClawX, which is built on OpenClaw
